summary.notes: All 5 inputs — including the minimal ('a forest, peaceful') and vague ('a city at night, cool') inputs — passed all 5 assertions. The skill successfully translates even sparse descriptions into fully specified cinematographic prompts with appropriate references, technical parameters, and detailed breakdowns. Every prompt includes variant options and actionable next steps. The cinematic-shot-prompt skill demonstrates the strongest performance of the three skills evaluated in this session, with 25/25 assertion passes.
